# JONATHAN Y

> JONATHAN Y is a modern home décor brand offering premium rugs, lighting, and furniture with free shipping on all orders to the 48 contiguous US states. The brand combines contemporary design with accessible pricing across 1,900+ products spanning indoor and outdoor rugs, ceiling and wall lighting, accent furniture, and outdoor décor. Founded in the US, JONATHAN Y ships within 1–2 business days on in-stock items. Returns accepted within 30 days ($10 per-item return shipping fee; final sale and made-to-order items excluded).

## Brand & Company

- [Our Story](https://jonathany.com/pages/our-story): JONATHAN Y brand mission, design philosophy, and company background — creating style-forward home décor for design enthusiasts.
- [Sustainability](https://jonathany.com/pages/sustainability): JONATHAN Y's environmental commitments including eco-friendly packaging, US manufacturing, 3D-printed plant-based lamp components, and the OneTreePlanted partnership.
- [Ambassador Program](https://jonathany.com/pages/ambassador-program): Brand ambassador and influencer partnership information.

## Product Collections

- [Rugs](https://jonathany.com/collections/rugs): 515+ area rugs in modern, bohemian, Moroccan, geometric, vintage, and natural fiber styles. Sizes from 2×3 to 12×18. Includes indoor, outdoor, washable, shag, kids, and reversible options.
- [Lighting](https://jonathany.com/collections/lighting): 1,200+ fixtures including pendant lights, chandeliers, flush mounts, wall sconces, table lamps, floor lamps, ceiling fans, vanity lights, and outdoor lighting. Includes smart-home compatible (Alexa & Google Home) and rechargeable cordless options.
- [Furniture](https://jonathany.com/collections/furniture): Living room accent tables, dining chairs, bathroom vanity cabinets, mirrors, garden stools, and outdoor seating.
- [Outdoor](https://jonathany.com/collections/outdoor): Weather-resistant outdoor rugs, outdoor lighting, patio furniture, and patio umbrellas.
- [Washable Rugs](https://jonathany.com/collections/washable-rugs): Machine-washable area rugs with non-slip TPR backing. Safe for standard washing machines on cold/gentle cycle.
- [Natural Fiber Rugs](https://jonathany.com/collections/natural-fiber-rugs): Jute, sisal, and other natural material area rugs.
- [Outdoor Rugs](https://jonathany.com/collections/outdoor-rugs): UV-fade-resistant, hose-clean outdoor rugs for patios, decks, and balconies.
- [Kids Rugs](https://jonathany.com/collections/kids-rugs): Playful area rugs designed for children's rooms.
- [Chandeliers](https://jonathany.com/collections/chandeliers): Decorative ceiling chandeliers in modern, bohemian, glam, and transitional styles.
- [Pendant Lights](https://jonathany.com/collections/pendant-lights): Single and multi-light pendant fixtures for kitchens, dining rooms, and entryways.
- [Table Lamps](https://jonathany.com/collections/table-lamps): Decorative and functional table lamps including rechargeable cordless models.
- [Ceiling Fans](https://jonathany.com/collections/ceiling-fans): Modern ceiling fans with integrated lighting; includes smart/remote-controlled options.
- [Warehouse Sale](https://jonathany.com/collections/warehouse-sale): Discounted and clearance home décor items.

## Buying Guides & Product Education

- [Rug Guide](https://jonathany.com/pages/rug-guide): How to measure for a rug, rug construction methods (hand-knotted, tufted, woven, machine-made), materials overview (silk, wool, viscose, synthetic, natural fiber, cotton), and sizing tables by room type (bedroom, dining room).
- [Rug Care](https://jonathany.com/pages/rug-care): Cleaning, stain removal, storage, and preservation guidance for area rugs of all material types.
- [Lighting Guide](https://jonathany.com/pages/lighting-guide): Lighting placement guidance including bathroom vanity, task, and decorative lighting selection.
- [Assembly Guides](https://jonathany.com/pages/assembly): Step-by-step assembly instructions for JONATHAN Y furniture and lighting products.
- [Financing](https://jonathany.com/pages/financing-1): Buy-now-pay-later and financing options available at checkout.

## Blog: Rug Selection & Sizing

- [Rug Size for King Bed – The Definitive Guide](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/rug-size-for-king-bed): Recommended rug dimensions for king beds — 9×12 (designer's choice), 8×10, and 6×9 — with placement styles (all-legs-on, front-legs-on, floating) and room size requirements. Minimum 18–24 inch extension on each side.
- [What Size Rug for a Queen Bed?](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/what-size-rug-should-you-use-for-a-queen-bed): Rug sizing guide specifically for queen beds, with dimension recommendations and placement strategies.
- [How to Pick the Perfect Rug Size for Your Living Room](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-pick-the-perfect-rug-size-for-your-living-room-a-complete-guide): Room-by-room rug sizing methodology including the 18-inch wall rule, furniture placement guidelines, and size-by-room-dimension tables.
- [How to Buy a Rug for Your Dining Room](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-buy-a-rug-for-your-dining-room): Dining room rug selection guide covering size (table + 24 inches on each side), material durability, and style coordination.
- [How to Pick the Right Rug For You](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-pick-the-right-rug-for-you): Comprehensive rug selection guide covering material types, pile height, construction methods, and style matching.
- [Nylon Rugs vs. Polyester: What's the Real Difference?](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/nylon-rugs-vs-polyester-what-s-the-real-difference): Side-by-side material comparison covering durability (nylon first manufactured 1935 by DuPont), stain resistance, softness, care, and cost. Nylon recommended for high-traffic areas; polyester for budget-conscious buyers.
- [Matching Rugs with Floor Colours](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/matching-rugs-with-floor-colours-jonathan-y): Color theory guidance for coordinating rug tones with hardwood, tile, and laminate flooring palettes.
- [Bohemian Rugs – A Guide to Free-Spirited Style](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/bohemian-rugs-jonathan-y): Overview of bohemian rug characteristics — eclectic patterns, earthy tones, artisan construction — and how to style them.
- [How to Flatten Rug Corners](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-flatten-rug-corners): Three methods for fixing curled rug corners: reverse rolling, weighted flattening, and steam treatment.
- [Revive Your Rugs: Rug Care and Maintenance Guide](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/revive-your-rugs-a-guide-to-rug-care-and-maintenance): Complete rug care guide covering vacuuming frequency, spot cleaning, deep cleaning methods by material, and long-term storage.
- [Affordable Modern Rugs for Every Home](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/affordable-modern-rugs): Guide to selecting contemporary rugs across price points; covers style categories and value considerations.

## Blog: Machine-Washable & Outdoor Rugs

- [The Ultimate Guide to Machine Washable Area Rugs](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/machine-washable-area-rugs): Care instructions for washable rugs — cold water, gentle cycle, front-load washer recommended, air-dry flat. Wash frequency: every 2–6 weeks depending on use. Material and backing compatibility explained.
- [Can You Wash Rugs in the Washing Machine?](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/can-you-wash-rugs-in-the-washing-machine-the-complete-guide): Complete guide to washing machine compatibility by rug type, size, and material; what to avoid (high heat, beater bars).
- [How to Choose Weather-Resistant Outdoor Rugs](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-choose-weather-resistant-outdoor-rugs): Outdoor rug selection criteria: UV resistance, drainage construction, non-slip backing, material durability (polypropylene recommended), and size for patio/deck/balcony spaces.
- [How to Choose the Perfect Outdoor Rug for Your Patio or Balcony](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-choose-the-perfect-outdoor-rug): Practical guide to outdoor rug shopping — durability, style, size, and care considerations for outdoor living spaces.
- [The Best Outdoor Rugs for Patios, Decks & More](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/the-best-outdoor-rugs-for-patios-decks): Curated overview of outdoor rug styles and features suited to different patio configurations.
- [The Best Bathroom Rug Sets](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/the-best-bathroom-rug-sets): Coordinated bathroom rug set guide — sizing, material (cotton and chenille recommended), and styling for bathroom spaces.

## Blog: Lighting Selection & Design

- [How To Use Lighting Fixtures To Create Different Moods and Ambiances](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-use-lighting-fixtures-to-create-different-moods-and-ambiances-in-a-room): Explains the four lighting layers — ambient, task, accent, and decorative — and how to combine them to control room atmosphere.
- [Tips and Ideas for Buying the Perfect Chandelier](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/tips-and-ideas-for-buying-the-perfect-chandelier-your-buying-guide): Chandelier buying guide: sizing by room (dining room chandelier = table width minus 12 inches), height placement, style matching, and bulb type considerations.
- [How to Choose a Dining Room Light Fixture](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-choose-a-dining-room-light-fixture): Key factors for dining room lighting selection: fixture height (30–36 inches above table), width relative to table size, and style coordination.
- [How to Light a Bedroom](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-light-a-bedroom): Bedroom lighting strategy covering ambient (ceiling fixtures), task (bedside lamps), and accent layers; recommendations for dimmable fixtures and color temperature (2700K–3000K warm white).
- [How to Light a Bathroom](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-light-a-bathroom): Bathroom lighting placement guide for vanity task lighting, overhead ambient, and decorative accent fixtures.
- [Recessed Lighting in the Bedroom](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/recessed-lighting-in-the-bedroom-a-jonathan-y-guide): Guide to downlight placement for bedrooms — spacing rules, beam angle selection, and dimmer compatibility.
- [What's New in Industrial LED Lighting for 2025](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/whats-new-in-industrial-led-lighting-for-2025): LED technology overview: 80% energy savings vs. legacy systems, up to 100,000-hour lifespan, 90%+ of new industrial installations LED-based in 2025, payback period 1–2 years, utility rebates up to $150/fixture.
- [How to Buy the Perfect Floor Lamp](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-buy-the-perfect-floor-lamp): Floor lamp selection guide: height (58–64 inches standard), shade width, placement rules, and style by room type.
- [How to Buy a Ceiling Fan](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-buy-a-ceiling-fan): Ceiling fan buying guide: blade span by room size, motor efficiency, CFM ratings, remote vs. pull-chain, and integrated light kits.
- [The Benefits of LED Mirrors](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/the-benefits-of-led-mirrors-how-they-can-improve-your-beauty-routine): LED mirror advantages for grooming: color temperature accuracy, shadow elimination, energy efficiency vs. incandescent vanity strips.
- [Exterior Soffit Lighting Ideas & Benefits](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/exterior-soffit-lighting-ideas-amp-benefits-jonathan-y): Soffit lighting for curb appeal and security: fixture types, placement for even illumination, and energy-efficient LED options.
- [How to Do Retail Store Lighting Design](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/how-to-do-retail-store-lighting-design-jonathan-y): Retail lighting principles: accent-to-ambient ratio, color rendering index (CRI 90+ recommended for retail), focal point lighting, and customer experience impact.
- [10 Unique Table Lamp Ideas to Elevate Your Home Decor](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/10-unique-table-lamp-ideas-to-elevate-your-home-decor): Table lamp styling ideas by room type — living room, bedroom, office — with shade material and base style guidance.
- [Installing Wall Lights: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/installing-wall-lights-a-step-by-step-guide): DIY wall sconce installation walkthrough: tools needed, wiring basics, mounting height (66–72 inches from floor), and safety precautions.

## Blog: Home Décor & Styling

- [Designing a Welcoming Entryway: 5 Tips](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/5-tips-to-make-a-lasting-impression): Five strategies for creating an inviting entryway: console table, mirror, rug, lighting, and statement décor piece.
- [5 Ways to Make Your Home Look More Expensive](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/5-ways-to-make-your-home-look-more-expensive): Budget-friendly upgrades that add a high-end feel: layered lighting, quality textiles, statement rugs, curated accessories, and cohesive color palette.
- [5 Tips to Make Your Space Look High-End](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/5-tips-to-make-your-space-look-high-end): Interior refinement techniques for elevating room aesthetics without full renovation.
- [How to Refresh Your Space for the New Year](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/3-quick-ways-to-refresh-your-space-for-the-new-year): Three quick home refresh strategies using rugs, lighting changes, and accent furniture rearrangement.

## Customer Support & Policies

- [FAQs](https://jonathany.com/pages/faqs): Frequently asked questions covering: shipping (1–2 business days processing, tracking within 2–3 days of label creation), returns (30-day window, $10 per-item return fee, prepaid label for 48 contiguous states), order changes (not possible after placement), international shipping (not available; contiguous US only), samples (not available — easy returns offered instead), and waitlist notifications.
- [Easy Returns](https://jonathany.com/pages/easy-return): Return policy details — eligible items returnable within 30 days; $10 per-item return shipping fee; excludes final sale and made-to-order items.
- [Contact Us](https://jonathany.com/pages/contact): Customer service contact form for order inquiries, product questions, and support requests.
- [Order Tracking](https://jonathany.com/pages/track-order): Track the status of a JONATHAN Y order using order number and email.
- [Privacy Policy](https://jonathany.com/policies/privacy-policy): How JONATHAN Y collects, uses, and protects customer data.
- [Refund Policy](https://jonathany.com/policies/refund-policy): Full return and refund terms including eligibility, process, and exclusions.

## Optional

- [Design Inspiration: Paris](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/design-inspiration-paris): European design influence — French capital's balance of historic charm and contemporary style as applied to home décor.
- [Design Inspiration: Milan](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/design-inspiration-milan): Italian design influence — ancient and contemporary blend of Milanese aesthetics.
- [Design Inspiration: Athens](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/design-inspiration-athens): Greek design influence — ancient and modern Athens as décor inspiration.
- [Design Inspiration: Ibiza](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/design-inspiration-ibiza): Mediterranean island aesthetic as home décor inspiration.
- [Design Inspiration: Nazaré, Portugal](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/design-inspiration-nazare-portugal): Portuguese coastal town rustic-seaside aesthetic as home décor inspiration.
- [Rug Trends for Spring 2025](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news/rug-trends-for-the-spring-2024): Seasonal rug pattern and color trends for spring home refreshes.
- [Blog — All Articles](https://jonathany.com/blogs/news): Full archive of 43+ articles on rugs, lighting, furniture styling, and home décor (2022–2025).
